message:
Remove unnecessary useMemo/useCallback (React Compiler handles it) (#5058)

The React Compiler (enabled in companion PR) automatically handles
memoization, making most manual useMemo/useCallback calls redundant.

Removed ~2,229 calls (84.5%) across 408 files:
- useCallback wrapping simple setState/toggle/navigate functions
- useMemo computing cheap derived values (filter, map, concat)
- useMemo wrapping simple object/array literals

Kept memoization where:
- Used as stable references in useEffect dependency arrays
- Computations are genuinely expensive (large dataset sorts, reduce)
- In animation/R3F hot paths
- Comments indicate intentional performance optimization

Closes #5045

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
